fixed-deposit.name: Fixed Deposit (FD)
fixed-deposit.description: Bank fixed deposits with guaranteed returns
fixed-deposit.note: FDs have zero loss probability but returns may not beat inflation.

gold.name: Gold
gold.note: Gold is a traditional safe haven that tends to do well during market crashes.

nifty50.name: Nifty 50 (Large Cap)
nifty50.description: India's top 50 companies by market cap
nifty50.note: Over any 15-year period in history, Nifty 50 has NEVER given negative returns.

midcap.name: Mid Cap Index
midcap.description: Medium-sized companies with higher growth potential
midcap.note: Higher risk, higher reward. Mid caps are more volatile but have outperformed large caps over long periods.

crypto.name: Cryptocurrency (Bitcoin)
crypto.note: Extremely volatile. Can gain or lose 50%+ in a single year. Not recommended for beginners.

relatableComparisons.comparison: the chance of getting heads when you flip a coin
the chance of rain on any given day in Mumbai during monsoon
the chance your food delivery arrives late
the chance of your flight being delayed
the chance of getting a flat tire this year
the chance of being struck by lightning in your lifetime
basically impossible — like finding a unicorn in your backyard

historicalInsights.insight: In any given year, markets can be unpredictable. But zoom out...
Over 3 years, the odds start shifting dramatically in your favor.
In 92% of 5-year periods, Nifty 50 has delivered positive returns.
10 years of patience has historically meant near-certain positive returns.
In the entire history of Nifty 50, there has been ZERO 15-year periods with negative returns.
